svg.title: Quant CoPilot — Proposed Intent Decomposition & Retrieval Architecture
svg.desc: A layered architecture diagram showing query decomposition into atomic needs, three parallel retrieval channels, a fusion layer, and LLM synthesis output.

g.text: Fast LLM · extracts typed information needs
Translates atoms → SQL WHERE clauses + vector queries simultaneously
Finds contradictions and confirmations across channels
Packs structured context + citation anchors for analyst LLM
